Video.summary: Coming from a history of drinking heavily and drug abuse, Nick Burnham was able to turn his life around completely by prioritizing his MMA training. Now, at HK38, Nick is looking to take the Lightweight title away from Dauda Keita in a fight that goes the distance!
Video.grandparentTitle: Out of the Cage - Nick Burnham
Video.title: Out of the Cage - Nick Burnham

Image.alt: Out of the Cage - Nick Burnham
Out of the Cage - Nick Burnham
Out of the Cage - Nick Burnham

Video.summary: Sean Michaels pride in his strict MMA training techniques, but wants to strengthen his legs. After visiting Sports Conditioning coach Marie Michalski, he learns new balancing exercises and small adjustments he can make to his regular training.
Video.grandparentTitle: After The Fight - Sean Michaels
Video.title: After The Fight - Sean Michaels

Image.alt: After The Fight - Sean Michaels
After The Fight - Sean Michaels
After The Fight - Sean Michaels

Video.summary: Hard Knocks 45 continues to bring you some of the best fights in MMA! This episode features matchups between amateur debut fighters Abbas Faleh vs. Tarren Gallamore and strikers Les Bisson vs. Gerra Gossen. The last fight of the night is an exciting Lightweight pro bout between Wolfgang Janssen and Craig Shintani. You do not want to skip this one!
Video.grandparentTitle: Fight Vault - HK45 - Episode 3
Video.title: Fight Vault - HK45 - Episode 3

Image.alt: Fight Vault - HK45 - Episode 3
Fight Vault - HK45 - Episode 3
Fight Vault - HK45 - Episode 3

Video.summary: Hard Knocks 46 opens with a rare treat: a ladies pro match between champions in differening disciplines, both looking to make their transition to MMA. Lindsay Garbatt is a former World Champion in Boxing while Valeria Mejia is a Pan-American Champion in Sambo. Following this is the main event of the evening, a challenge for the vacant Bantamweight title between Jesse Arnett and Dimitri Waardenburg! You do not want to miss this!
Video.grandparentTitle: Fight Vault - HK46 - Episode 1
Video.title: Fight Vault - HK46 - Episode 1

Image.alt: Fight Vault - HK46 - Episode 1
Fight Vault - HK46 - Episode 1
Fight Vault - HK46 - Episode 1

Video.summary: Spartan Events is into its third year of running its hugely successful promotion, Shock N Awe. With top match making throughout the fight cards, they have been touted as some of the biggest and toughest fights in the UK. Shock N Awe consistently delivers hard hitting action, also going one step further by adding in the personalities from MC Ricky Wright, Ring Girls Poppy and Alex and as well as the huge UK fight teams!
Video.grandparentTitle: Shock n Awe - Episode 01
Video.title: Shock n Awe - Episode 01

Image.alt: Shock n Awe - Episode 01
Shock n Awe - Episode 01

Video.summary: Hard Knocks Fighting: HK46 filmado en el Markin Macphail Center en Calgary. Los luchadores profesionales y aficionados de toda América del Norte luchan en la jaula. Phil Towler vs. Chris Lee Byrne, Mike O'Neill vs. Alexi Argyriou.
Video.grandparentTitle: HK 46 - Episodio 4
Video.title: HK 46 - Episodio 4

Image.alt: HK 46 - Episodio 4
HK 46 - Episodio 4
HK 46 - Episodio 4

Video.summary: Hard Knocks 47 kicks off with with a Featherweight Title Fight in the Amateur Division as striker Joe ""Flash"" Mapanda challenges the reigning champion Justin Basra. This is followed by an Amateur Lightweight Title Fight as Tom ""The Greek Warrior"" Theocharis takes on Alex Martinez. Wrapping up this episode is a pro bout between wrestler TJ Laramie and Luke Noel. You do not want to miss it!
Video.grandparentTitle: Fight Vault - HK47 - Episode 1
Video.title: Fight Vault - HK47 - Episode 1

Image.alt: Fight Vault - HK47 - Episode 1

Best of 'Shock N Awe' Finishes
Best of 'Shock N Awe' Finishes

Video.summary: Ultimate Warrior Challenge is one of Europe's leading MMA shows, since it's inception in 2006 it's has grown steadily and delivered some of the most exciting MMA fights Europe has seen, with a truly Internationalfight roster, UWC has built a solid reputation for bringing some of the Worlds toughest fighters to square off in the UWC octagon, fighters from the UK, USA, Brazil, Sweden, Italy, Africa, Poland, France, Cyprus, Greece have all fought in the UWC cage. UFC stars such as Simeon Thoreson, Luke 'Bigslow' Barnatt, RiccoRodriguez,Thierry "The African Assassin" Sokoudjou, Phil De Fries, Paul Kelly to name but a few, have graced the UWC cage. UWC continues to grow and to bring the fight fans across Europe the fights they want to see.
Video.grandparentTitle: Ultimate Warrior Challenge - Episode 02
Video.title: Ultimate Warrior Challenge - Episode 02

Image.alt: Ultimate Warrior Challenge - Episode 02
Ultimate Warrior Challenge - Episode 02
Ultimate Warrior Challenge - Episode 02

Shock n Awe 14 - Benny Carr v. Kieran Rice
Shock n Awe 14 - Benny Carr v. Kieran Rice

Video.summary: A private pre-season event held in a secret warehouse in Budapest, Hungary, the inaugural Karate Combat: Genesis event took place on February 3, 2018. The event showcases the incredible depth of the fight roster highlighting many karate legends in various weight classes, competing for the first time ever in this new sporting league.
Video.grandparentTitle: KARATE COMBAT: GENESIS - Reda Messaoudi vs. Luiz Rocha
